name: Bitget Cryptocurrency Exchange API
what_it_does: Cryptocurrency exchange REST and WebSocket API with integrated copy trading — enabling traders and developers to access spot, margin, futures (USDT/coin-margined), and options markets across 700+ trading pairs, manage copy trading portfolios programmatically, and build trading bots with HMAC-SHA256 authentication, with Bitget's differentiator being its large copy trading user base (100,000+ elite traders).
use_cases: Executing algorithmic spot and futures trades via Bitget REST API for automated strategies
Managing copy trading portfolios via Bitget API for following or becoming elite traders
Streaming real-time order data via Bitget WebSocket for high-frequency trading bots
Accessing futures with up to 125x leverage via Bitget API for leveraged strategies
Building smart trading bots via Bitget API for grid trading and DCA automation
not_for: US users (Bitget restricted from US market — use Coinbase or Kraken)
Institutional custody with regulatory reporting requirements
Options traders needing deep liquidity (use Deribit for serious options trading)
best_when: A non-US trader wants a modern exchange with wide pair selection, copy trading ecosystem, and comprehensive REST/WebSocket API for building trading automation.
avoid_when: You're in the US, need regulatory compliance, require institutional services, or need deep options liquidity.

auth.notes: API Key + API Secret + API Passphrase for HMAC-SHA256 signing. ACCESS-KEY header (API key). ACCESS-SIGN header (HMAC signature). ACCESS-TIMESTAMP header (ISO 8601 UTC). ACCESS-PASSPHRASE header (set at API key creation). Signature: HMAC-SHA256 of timestamp + method.upper() + path + query_or_body. Three-factor auth (key + signature + passphrase) is more secure than standard two-factor. No OAuth2.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access free; spot maker 0.10% / taker 0.10% (BGB token discounts available)
pricing.paid_tiers: VIP tiers based on 30-day volume with reduced fees
pricing.notes: Seychelles incorporated. Founded 2018. $30M+ funding. 25M+ users. Known for: copy trading (2M+ followers, 100K+ elite traders). BGB Token for fee discounts. 700+ trading pairs. Spot, margin (5x-10x), futures (USDT-M and Coin-M), options. Grid trading bots built-in. One-click copy trading. Smart money tracking. US restricted. Cayman Islands entity. Three-factor API auth (passphrase) is more secure than two-factor. Active in Web3: Bitget Wallet (non-custodial). Licensed in some jurisdictions (US not included). API v2 launched 2023 — cleaner design than v1.

performance.rate_limits: 1,200 requests/minute for most endpoints; lower for order placement

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Three-factor auth (key + HMAC signature + passphrase). ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. US restricted. Seychelles. Copy trading differentiator. 1,200 req/min. API v2 (2023). 4 official SDKs.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Order reads idempotent by order ID. clientOid for client-assigned order deduplication. Cancel idempotent by order ID.
known_agent_gotchas: Three-factor auth: ACCESS-PASSPHRASE header required (set at key creation, cannot be recovered if lost)
ISO 8601 UTC timestamp: use UTC timezone explicitly (e.g., 2024-01-15T10:00:00.000Z)
API v2 launched 2023 — older documentation may reference v1 endpoints (different paths)
US users restricted — verify jurisdiction before building Bitget integrations
Passphrase lost = API key must be deleted and recreated (cannot be viewed after creation)
Copy trading API requires Elite Trader or VIP status to access certain endpoints

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Three-factor auth (key + HMAC-SHA256 + passphrase) is more secure than two-factor. ISO 8601 UTC timestamp for replay protection. Seychelles jurisdiction (limited regulation). US restricted. Cryptocurrency financial data — high value target. No OAuth2. Passphrase adds additional compromise barrier.
